title: euphorbia helioscopia f. major
intro: Euphorbia helioscopia f. major, also known as greater spurge or dog's-spur grass, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Euphorbia helioscopia f. major can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
